name: Wood (Kayu)
description: radiates a calm and growing energy. It represents flexibility
financial: Steady growth awaits. Your patience will yield positive financial returns.
romantic: Your relationships will bloom slowly but form strong deep-seated roots.

name: Fire (Api)
description: burns with high-octane passion. It represents transformation and raw energy.
financial: Take bold risks now! Dynamic energy will burn through obstacles and unlock wealth.
romantic: Passion is intense. Watch out for sudden heat arguments; stay cool.

name: Water (Air)
description: flows smoothly and adapts to any obstacle. It represents emotional depth.
financial: Income will flow smoothly like water. Adapt to new side gigs to increase depth.
romantic: You flow with empathy and deep understanding. Compatibility is high with calm souls.

name: Metal (Logam)
description: is rigid and highly structured. It represents focus and strength.
financial: Structure your budget. Steel-hard determination will lead to a highly stable income.
romantic: You are protective and solid. Relationships are firm but don't be too stiff.

name: Earth (Tanah)
description: is grounded and stable. It represents fertility and resourcefulness.
financial: A grounded approach brings stability. Invest in real estate or secure savings.
romantic: You are reliable and supportive. A solid foundation for long-term love.

name: Cosmos (Kosmik)
description: holds the ancient mystery of stars. It represents infinite potential.
financial: Unexpected windfalls from unknown directions. The stars align for career leaps.
romantic: A stellar romance is written in the heavens. A cosmic connection awaits.

name: Wind (Angin)
description: moves swiftly and changes directions. It represents intellectual freedom.
financial: Opportunities come and go quickly. Stay alert and catch the breeze of wealth.
romantic: Romance is lighthearted and playful. Keep conversations fresh and breezy.

name: Thunder (Petir)
description: strikes with sudden intensity. It represents raw force and voice.
financial: Sudden financial breakthroughs or rapid career transitions. Ride the storm.
romantic: Electric chemistry! Sparks will fly; make sure it doesn't cause short circuits.

name: Light (Cahaya)
description: radiates pure purity and clarity. It represents wisdom.
financial: Your financial paths are clear. Honesty and wisdom bring abundance.
romantic: Love is pure and transparent. Truth and open communication strengthen bonds.

name: Shadow (Bayangan)
description: conceals secrets and movements. It represents stealth.
financial: Opportunities lie hidden in the dark. Silence is gold; invest quietly.
romantic: Mysterious and alluring. Keep a bit of mystery to fuel romantic attraction.
